attribution_traps.title: My Life in the Bush of Ghosts
attribution_traps.creator: Talking Heads
attribution_traps.origin: Subtle trap: Byrne side project with Eno, routinely misattributed to the band

influence_facts.note: Producer on More Songs About Buildings and Food, Fear of Music, Remain in Light.
Afrobeat's influence on Remain in Light is widely documented.
